meaning: vi.东倒西歪地走,蹒跚学步,散步vt.蹒跚(或信步)走路n.东倒西歪的走路,刚学走步的小孩
examples: Even before the tender age of three, the twins managed to toddle into adventure.
But XHTML has yet to toddle, yet to smile, and yet to cry loud enough to get the attention of most Web designers.
As soon as we're old enough to toddle toward the Hubba Bubba on the lowest shelf at the checkout aisle, we get the concept of money.
He would toddle into my office and begin chattering about something important on his mind.
